description_long: This object is a stylized doll with a large head and slender body, featuring exaggerated proportions typical of anime or manga-inspired figures. The doll has long hair styled into two pigtails that extend well past the shoulders, with visible hair ties or ribbons securing them. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the legs are straight and close together, giving the figure a T-pose stance. The silhouette suggests the doll is wearing a form-fitting outfit, possibly a bodysuit or leotard, with no visible patterns or textures. The feet are small and rounded, and the hands are simple, with no detailed fingers visible. The overall design is smooth and streamlined, with no visible joints or articulation points.
description: A stylized doll with a large head, long pigtails, and a form-fitting outfit, posed with arms outstretched. The figure has smooth, simple features and an anime-inspired silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's large head, symmetrical pigtails, outstretched arms, and straight legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the doll's pronounced chest, long pigtail extending down the back, and the curve of the back and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both pigtails, and the back contours of the body and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the head, chest, and the long pigtail trailing behind.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll appears to be wearing a simple, form-fitting bodysuit or leotard with no visible patterns, textures, or additional garments. The style is minimalistic and typical of generic anime or manga character dolls.
attribute_pose: The doll is posed in a T-pose with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and together, head facing forward, and torso upright. The posture is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial features are not visible in the silhouette, so the expression cannot be determined.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight hair styled into two pigtails that extend down past the waist, secured with visible ties or ribbons.
